_comment: Klinika Melitus artifact tracking manifest. Append one entry per approved-and-published artifact during the 30-day launch window. See per-entry schema below; populate at publish time. Tracks the ≥5-artifacts-in-30-days success criterion per U18 launch-window definition.

_entry_schema.lane: string — lane name (article_engine, image_engine, ad_engine, site_engine, storyboard, linkedin_engine, x_engine)
_entry_schema.approver_name: string — primary reviewer who signed off
_entry_schema.approver_secondary: string|null — secondary reviewer (required while medical_pl is placeholder-regime per TD-17)
_entry_schema.reviewer_assist_verdict: string — clean | soft_warn | hard_block (hard_block entries should not appear; if one slips through it's a substrate bug)
_entry_schema.reviewer_assist_flags: list[string] — rule ids that fired (empty if clean)
